title: poa trivialis subsp. sylvicola
intro: Poa trivialis subsp. sylvicola, also known as forest meadow grass, is a subspecies of the common meadow grass (Poa trivialis). It is a perennial grass native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
